The '''E-series protocol droid''' was a line of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]].

[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]] of the [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] considered them superior to the most well known [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droids]].

Five of theses [[Droid/Legends|droids]] served onboard the [[Belarus-class medium cruiser]] ''[[Glorious]]'' during the hunt for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
